## Meeting Purpose

[Performance review and realignment discussion between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Vianca, a recently onboarded full-time employee.](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vianca's transition from part-time to full-time (Nov 1) was suboptimal, lacking proper onboarding and training](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Performance concerns exist, particularly in strategy and client management for technical accounts](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Both parties acknowledge room for improvement and a need to rebuild trust](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Vianca's self-identified strengths: people skills, content creation, and team management](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding and Initial Performance Concerns

  - [Vianca started full-time on November 1st, following a part-time period](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Marcel expressed concerns about strategy quality, relevance of topics, and overall confidence in Vianca's work](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Issues noted with Galileo account: irrelevant topics, missing strategies and agendas](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Comparison made to quicker ramp-up of other new hires](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Workload and Technical Challenges

  - [Vianca struggling with balancing onboarding, client work, and technical content](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Difficulty in thoroughly researching technical topics due to time constraints](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Challenges with AI-generated content hallucinations and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### Strengths and Areas of Confidence

  - [Vianca identifies people skills as her superpower](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Comfortable with client onboarding, team delegation, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Experience in managing teams and understanding client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Familiarity with B2B, agency, lifestyle, and some medical topics](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Previous Experience and Transition

  - [Vianca's last role focused on podcasting, team management, and content oversight](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Experience with travel content early in her career](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Previous work with DesignRish, a marketplace for agencies](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Performance Expectations and Compensation

  - [Marcel noted Vianca is one of the highest-paid vendors, setting a high performance bar](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Emphasis on rebuilding trust and aligning expectations](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of the importance of client satisfaction and reputation management](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Reassess Vianca's role and responsibilities based on identified strengths](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Develop a plan to address technical knowledge gaps and improve client management skills](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Consider realigning Vianca's workload to better match her expertise areas (B2B, agency, lifestyle)](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Implement a more structured onboarding and training process for future hires](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussions to track progress and rebuild trust](https://fathom.video/share/fMK95BBGQSz8Msbits-TDCSsNzws9wRF?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
